positive.base_prompt: continuous viewpoint, stable scene geometry, coherent depth structure, stable foreground-background layout, consistent object scale, repeatable local edges and corner-like details, stable exposure and white balance, temporal coherence

motion_prompts.stop: near-static camera pose, stable still-scene geometry, preserved fine structure
motion_prompts.forward: smooth forward egomotion, clear depth progression, stable perspective
motion_prompts.left_turn: smooth left turn, continuous camera rotation, geometry-aligned motion
motion_prompts.right_turn: smooth right turn, continuous camera rotation, geometry-aligned motion
motion_prompts.mixed: coherent mixed egomotion, readable camera movement, stable transition

negative.negative_prompt: blurry, low detail, low quality, distorted geometry, warped structure, broken perspective, inconsistent scale, flicker, temporal inconsistency, unstable edges, drifting textures, texture swimming, drifting objects, duplicated objects, hallucinated objects, unstable camera, camera shake, sudden viewpoint change, ghosting, motion smear, artifacts, oversmoothing
